sources.title: RZ-9 (Military Strike)
sources.description: A computer scientist and drone pilot is put on a hit list due to his religious beliefs. He and his sister are pursued by super soldiers, called Erasers, to capture them dead or alive.

metadata.Plot: A computer scientist and drone pilot is put on a hit list due to his religious beliefs. He and his sister are pursued by super soldiers, called Erasers, to capture them dead or alive.
metadata.Actors: Ethan McDowell, Morgan Obenreder, Josh Marble
